name: localspace-distribution
description: Measures localspace density distribution across N independent L2-start sessions. Each run fires a fresh POST /narrate with a unique seed and a distinct L2 world prompt from prompt_cycle, then GETs /diagnostics/sites to read active_site localspace metrics. Validates ls_pct is in [30,75], eligible_tile_count > 0, and localspace_count >= 1 per run.
